description.zh: 哦，你好啊，你好啊。上次你耍的把戏真是烂透了，我都想找个人送你上西天，花裤衩先生。但，既然你来了，就给你个赎罪的机会。对我来说很简单，就像从小孩子身上抢糖果一样——我的信任可以买到，100万卢布，我们就可以忘掉之前的误会。
description.en: Well hello-hello, little rat. That last trick you pulled was total bullshit, that's for sure. I even thought of getting a team to get rid of you, mister fancypants. Well, since you’re here, I guess you want to amend for your sins. It’s simple to me, like taking candy from a baby - my trust can be bought. One million in rubles - and we’ll forget about past misunderstandings.
